creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
On

# uname -a
FreeBSD 132amd64.local 13.2-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p8 GENERIC amd64

I get the following run-time error:

# /usr/local/bin/arc_summary

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZFS Subsystem Report                            Tue Dec 12 22:43:40 2023
FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p8                                    zpl version 5
Machine: 132amd64.local (amd64)                         spa version 5000

ARC status:                                                      HEALTHY
        Memory throttle count:                                         0

Error in sys.excepthook:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 1034, in <module>
    main()
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 1028, in main
    section_calls[section](kstats)
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 554, in section_arc
    meta = arc_stats['meta']
KeyError: 'meta'

Original exception was:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 1034, in <module>
    main()
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 1028, in main
    section_calls[section](kstats)
  File "/usr/local/bin/arc_summary", line 554, in section_arc
    meta = arc_stats['meta']
KeyError: 'meta'

This does not happen on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE.
